title: PSI Candidate Information Bulletin — Oregon Construction Contractors
description: Official PSI exam blueprint covering format, content areas, and passing criteria for the Oregon CCB exam.

title: Oregon CCB Pre-License Education Requirements
description: Official CCB page describing the 16-hour pre-license training requirement.

title: ORS Chapter 701 — Construction Contractors
description: Oregon Revised Statutes governing construction contractor licensing, bonds, and enforcement.

title: ORS 701.305 — Written Contract Requirements for Residential Contractors
description: Oregon statute specifying when a written contract is required for residential construction work and what it must contain, including the CCB license number, price, dates, and right-of-rescission notice.

title: ORS 701.310 — Additional Contract Disclosures
description: Oregon statute detailing required bond and insurance disclosures that must appear in residential construction contracts.

title: OAR 812-009 — CCB Administrative Rules: Licensing and Conduct
description: Oregon Administrative Rules promulgated by the CCB governing contractor conduct, complaint procedures, and enforcement actions.

title: ORS Chapter 654 — Occupational Safety and Health
description: Oregon Safe Employment Act statutes establishing broad workplace safety duties and compliance obligations.

title: Oregon OSHA OAR Chapter 437 Division 3 — Construction (Current Rules Index)
description: Oregon OSHA construction rules index linking active subdivision texts and administrative orders.

title: OAR 437-003 Subdivision M — Fall Protection
description: Oregon construction fall-protection rules including Oregon-specific duty and training provisions.

title: OAR 437-003 Subdivision E — Personal Protective and Life Saving Equipment
description: Oregon construction PPE requirements including hazard assessment, selection, and training obligations.

title: OAR 437-003 Subdivision C — General Safety and Health Provisions
description: Oregon-adopted construction general safety provisions, including accident prevention and training requirements.

title: OAR 437-003 Subdivision P — Excavations
description: Oregon excavation and trench safety requirements, including competent person inspections and protective systems.

title: OAR 437-003 Subdivision X — Stairways and Ladders
description: Oregon construction stairway and ladder safety requirements.

title: Oregon CCB Laws & Rules
description: Official Oregon CCB laws and rules gateway for contractor compliance references.

title: CPWR Construction Chart Book (7th Edition)
description: Industry research reference used for contextual construction safety trends; not controlling Oregon law.
